privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real US Senate roll call data from Voteview (117th Congress). The metadata correctly identifies party codes (100 for Dem, 200 for Rep) and output paths. A critical bug exists in the verifier and metadata: it incorrectly claims Joe Manchin's ICPSR is 29940. ICPSR 29940 actually belongs to progressive Senator Tammy Baldwin. Because Baldwin's ideal point falls outside the centrist range between the Democratic and Republican medians, the verifier's "Manchin Centrist Check" will permanently fail any correct implementation of the multidimensional scaling analysis. Finally, the minimum correlation claim of 0.8 is empirically sound, as the true correlation between Dim1 and party in this dataset exceeds 0.94.
